criteria.description: --field !key matches entries missing a specific key
criteria.evidence: NegatedFieldFilter implemented at internal/filter/filter.go:169-190. CLI wiring at cmd/logalyzer/search.go:91-93 parses '!' prefix and creates NegatedFieldFilter. Unit tests: TestSF9_NegatedFieldFilterMissingKey (filter_test.go:573), TestSF9_NegatedFieldFilterAllPresent (:594), TestSF9_NegatedFieldFilterNonePresent (:606), TestSF9_NegatedFieldFilterWellKnownLevel (:617) cover Extra fields and well-known fields. Integration test: TestSF9_SearchNegatedFieldFlag (search_test.go:439) runs the binary with '--field !region' and verifies 2 of 3 entries returned.

criteria.description: --no-color disables colored output even when outputting to a TTY
criteria.evidence: Flag declared at cmd/logalyzer/search.go:36. Override logic at search.go:145-148: colorEnabled is set from IsTerminal, then forced to false when --no-color is set. Integration test: TestOU4_NoColorFlag (search_test.go:416) runs binary with '--no-color' and asserts output contains no ANSI escape sequences (checks for '\033[').
